commands.repair_reason: Contributor fixes and current-head proof are needed, followed by maintainer review of the protected stacked Policy security scope; this is not a safe automatic repair lane while proof is stale.; Needs attention: The diff is security-sensitive, and the omitted-Gateway-config evidence gap can weaken the new policy boundary.; Review finding: [P1] Cover omitted Gateway config in exposure evidence — extensions/policy/src... (sha=a627850d7515135c1bdb7fa4b3d41aa4683dd896)
commands.review_summary:
Adds Gateway exposure conformance evidence and findings to the bundled Policy plugin, alongside stacked policy runtime/approval metadata, docs, tests, and generated protocol metadata.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding by source inspection: PR head returns no Gateway exposure evidence when cfg.gateway is absent, while current main makes gateway/auth/rateLimit optional. I did not execute the probe because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Contributor fixes and current-head proof are needed, followed by maintainer review of the protected stacked Policy security scope; this is not a safe automatic repair lane while proof is stale.

target.title: Policy: add gateway exposure checks
target.body:
## Summary

Adds a Policy 1.0 Gateway exposure conformance category with config-only evidence and doctor/lint findings. Stacked after #81974.

- Records Gateway bind/auth/rate-limit/Control UI/Tailscale/remote/HTTP posture as policy evidence.
- Enforces non-loopback bind, auth, explicit rate-limit, insecure Control UI toggles, Tailscale Funnel, remote mode, HTTP endpoints, and unrestricted URL-fetch posture.
- Documents the new Gateway policy rules and evidence shape.

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior addressed: adds policy conformance evidence and findings for Gateway, Control UI, WebChat, and HTTP exposure settings, including unsafe remote binding, disabled auth, missing rate-limit posture, insecure Control UI toggles, Tailscale Funnel, remote gateway mode, enabled HTTP endpoints, and unrestricted URL-fetch posture.
- Real environment tested: WSL Ubuntu-24.04 source worktrees created from `upstream/main` and PR head `d67f0c3a05d2c3f2f665ca2a282c86fcf958b9c1`.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: created clean detached worktrees for `upstream/main` and `fork/policy-gateway-exposure-conformance`; in each worktree ran `node --import ./node_modules/tsx/dist/loader.mjs ./probe-gateway-policy.mjs`. The probe wrote a temp `openclaw.jsonc` and `policy.jsonc`, registered the real policy doctor checks with `registerPolicyDoctorChecks()`, and ran the real doctor/lint path with `runDoctorLintChecks()` against an unsafe Gateway config.
- Evidence after fix (screenshot, recording, terminal capture, console output, redacted runtime log, linked artifact, or copied live output):

![PR #81981 Gateway exposure policy before/after proof](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/giodl73-repo/openclaw/proof-artifacts/pr-81981-fresh/pr-81981/pr-81981-gateway-exposure-policy-before-after-proof.png)

```text
Fresh proof artifact: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/giodl73-repo/openclaw/proof-artifacts/pr-81981-fresh/pr-81981/pr-81981-gateway-exposure-policy-before-after-proof.png
Proof summary: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/giodl73-repo/openclaw/proof-artifacts/pr-81981-fresh/pr-81981/summary.txt

eEFORE upstream/main:
status=0
policyRegisterImport=missing-or-failed
importError=ENOENT
gatewayChecksRegistered=0
gatewayFindings=0
gatewayFindingTypes=<none>
ok=false

AFTER PR #81981 head:
status=0
policyRegisterImport=ok
importError=<none>
gatewayChecksRegistered=8
gatewayFindings=12
gatewayFindingTypes=policy/gateway-auth-disabled,policy/gateway-control-ui-insecure,policy/gateway-http-endpoint-enabled,policy/gateway-http-url-fetch-unrestricted,policy/gateway-non-loopback-bind,policy/gateway-rate-limit-missing,policy/gateway-remote-enabled,policy/gateway-tailscale-funnel
ok=true
```

- Observed result after fix: `upstream/main` has no Gateway policy registration path, so no Gateway checks or findings are produced. PR head registers 8 Gateway policy checks and reports 12 denied unsafe Gateway posture findings from config-only evidence.
- What was not tested: no live Gateway server was launched for this proof image. The proof directly verifies policy doctor/lint behavior against temp config and policy files.

## Validation

- `CI=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/policy/src/doctor/register.test.ts extensions/policy/src/runtime-tool-policy.test.ts extensions/policy/src/cli.test.ts extensions/oc-path/src/oc-path/tests/document.test.ts src/commands/doctor-lint.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-lint-flow.test.ts src/flows/doctor-repair-flow.test.ts src/flows/bundled-health-checks.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/plugin-approval.test.ts src/infra/approval-view-model.test.ts src/cli/program/register.maintenance.test.ts src/cli/program/preaction.test.ts src/cli/command-path-policy.test.ts src/config/io.best-effort.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check extensions/policy extensions/oc-path src/flows src/commands src/gateway/server-methods/plugin-approval.ts src/infra/plugin-approvals.ts src/infra/policy-approval-metadata.ts src/plugin-sdk/health.ts src/cli/program/register.maintenance.ts src/cli/program/preaction.ts src/config/io.ts`
- `pnpm check:changed`
